title: Fable-simulation mechanical slices F1-F5 per docs/plans/fable-simulation-2026-07.md — COMPACT generator, per-vendor re-render, class-keyed overlay wiring, E1-E6 bait-scenario eval harness, calibration soak
summary: The authored layers (thinking.md, adaptations/{opus,gpt,flash}.md, design doc, research) merged in PR #319 (81502351). Implement the mechanical slices EXACTLY per the design doc's slice table — F1 COMPACT.md generator + drift test (TestFableCompact_TracesToSSOT, TestFableCompact_Under80Lines); F2 per-vendor re-render, formatting-only (TestPublishRender_PerVendorForm, TestPublishCodex_InlinesReferenceDigest); F3 class-keyed overlay selection (TestOverlaySelect_FastClassGetsCompactOnly, TestOverlaySelect_DeepClassGetsFullTree; DEPENDS: skill-overlays-bridge-layer + advisor-skill-selection); F4 E1-E6 eval harness (code-audited ACS predicates, fable-sim-scorecard.json); F5 calibration soak. ONE SLICE PER CYCLE in F-order; read the design doc first — it contains the evidence constraints (flash never gets the full tree; d=2.47 belongs to affordance-removal; external gates are the load-bearing layer). GENERALIZED 2026-07-07T21:40Z per operator: vendor adaptation files REMOVED (universal rules folded into core; COMPACT.md = capability-class projection, any vendor; harness knobs -> driver profiles; vendor formatting -> automated F2). Design doc updated on branch feat/fable-generalize.
acceptance: per-slice RED tests from the design doc slice table, verbatim
go vet, -race, apicover -enforce green per slice
F5 exit: fable-sim-scorecard.json shows each model class improving on E1-E6 with its adapted projection vs baseline
notes: [REBAND 2026-07-23] 0.88->0.72: skill/eval-harness feature work (priority=high, kind=feature) — valuable but not pipeline-integrity; the 0.85-0.97 band is reserved for that class.
